payload.answer: SQL queries are currently disabled. To enable SQL access for debugging, please set BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED to true.
payload.decision: The SQL query was not executed because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED is set to false, preventing direct SQL access for security and stability reasons.

entity_resolution.reason: No entities were processed as the command was not executed.

payload.intent: The user attempted to execute an SQL query to retrieve memory cards.

details: Command '/brain admin sql SELECT * FROM memory_cards' was blocked.
Reason: BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED is set to false.

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED to true to allow SQL queries.
Use standard /brain commands to interact with memory cards instead of direct SQL.
